concept: Participant / One Who Stands as a Part
description: An individual who actively takes part in an event, activity, or process. Their role is defined by active engagement and contribution.
rationale: A composition of the established roots 'pa' (a part, a piece) and 'ka' (to stand, to be present with strength). The word's structure literally means 'one who stands as a part,' defining a participant by their active engagement.
